def log(msg: str):
    """Timestamped log to stderr (stdout reserved for JSON results)."""
    ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3]
    print(f"[{ts}] {msg}", file=sys.stderr)

def _build_auth_url(url: str) -> str:
    """Inject HTTP basic-auth credentials into the URL."""
    from urllib.parse import urlparse, urlunparse
    p = urlparse(url)

redentials into the URL."""
    from urllib.parse import urlparse, urlunparse
    p = urlparse(url)
    netloc = f"{HTTP_USER}:{HTTP_PASS}@{p.hostname}"
    if p.port:
        netloc += f":{p.port}"
    return urlunparse((p.scheme, netloc, p.path, p.params, p.query, p.fragment))

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Session Manager
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

    """Execute the login flow. Returns result dict."""
    session = SAPSession()

    try:
        # Launch browser
        session.launch_browser(headless=headless)
